languages.text: "Я открыл{mf||а} стазис-контейнер Себериана. Там были его записи, а в них приказы для вашего полка".
"I opened Seberian's stasis container. His logs were inside and, within them, orders for your regiment."
languages.original_text: "Я открыл{mf||а} стазис-контейнер Себериана. Там были его записи, а в них приказы для вашего полка".

traits.locale_text: "I opened Seberian's stasis container. His logs were inside, and within them, orders for your regiment."
"I opened Seberian's stasis container. His logs were inside, and within them, orders for your regiment."
"I opened Seberian's stasis container. His logs were inside and, within them, orders for your regiment."
"I opened Seberian's stasis container. His logs were inside and, within them, orders for your regiment."
"I opened Seberian's stasis container. His logs were inside and, within them, orders for your regiment."

languages.text: “我打开了塞贝里安的静滞舱。他的日志在里面，上面写着给你们军团的命令。
languages.original_text: "I opened Seberian's stasis container. His logs were inside and, within them, orders for your regiment."

traits.locale_text: “我打开了塞贝里安的静滞舱。他的日志在里面，上面写着给你们军团的命令。

languages.text: "Seberian'ın staz konteynerini açtım. Kayıtları içindeydi. Kayıtların arasında alayınıza verdiği emirler de vardı."
languages.original_text: "I opened Seberian's stasis container. His logs were inside and, within them, orders for your regiment."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian'ın staz konteynerini açtım. Kayıtları içindeydi. Kayıtların arasında alayınıza verdiği emirler de vardı."

languages.text: « J'ai ouvert le caisson de stase de Seberian et trouvé ses journaux à l'intérieur. Il y avait rédigé des ordres à l'intention de votre régiment. »
languages.original_text: "I opened Seberian's stasis container. His logs were inside and, within them, orders for your regiment."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai ouvert le caisson de stase de Seberian et trouvé ses journaux à l'intérieur. Il y avait rédigé des ordres à l'intention de votre régiment. »

languages.text: «He abierto el contenedor de suspensión de Seberian. Contenía sus registros, así como órdenes para su regimiento».
languages.original_text: "I opened Seberian's stasis container. His logs were inside and, within them, orders for your regiment."

traits.locale_text: «He abierto el contenedor de suspensión de Seberian. Contenía sus registros, así como órdenes para su regimiento».

languages.text: "Ich habe Seberians Stasebehälter geöffnet. Er enthielt seine Aufzeichnungen und Befehle für Euer Regiment."
languages.original_text: "I opened Seberian's stasis container. His logs were inside and, within them, orders for your regiment."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe Seberians Stasebehälter geöffnet. Er enthielt seine Aufzeichnungen und Befehle für Euer Regiment."

languages.text: 「シベリアンの休眠カプセルを開けた。彼のログが入っていて、その中にはあなたの連隊への命令があった」
languages.original_text: "I opened Seberian's stasis container. His logs were inside and, within them, orders for your regiment."

traits.locale_text: 「シベリアンの休眠カプセルを開けた。彼のログが入っていて、その中にはあなたの連隊への命令があった」
